sharedStateObservations.description: Visualization functions accept both EMAActivity instances and raw dict inputs
Output validation checks file headers for PNG (magic bytes) and PDF (%PDF-)
Matplotlib non-inter Agg backend used for headless testing

salientSummary: Visualization module provides histograms, tier distribution charts, and layer heatmaps. PNG/PDF output validation (VAL-ACT-003) works correctly. All 46 visualization tests pass.
